title: Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug, Upgraded Rechargeable Self Stirring Coffee Mug, Electric Self Stirring Cup with Mixer for Milk Tea Office Home (Pink)
description:
About this item
【USB Rechargeable Coffee Mug】Say goodbye to constantly replacing batteries! This self-stirring coffee mug can be easily charged via USB cable, eliminating the need for disposable batteries. It takes only 2 hours to fully charge. A single charge allows for multiple uses, making it ideal for busy lifestyles. Plus, its waterproof design ensures long-lasting performance without leaks.
【Simple to Operate】To use, simply remove the magnetic beads from the lid and place them at the bottom of the cup. Press the button to activate stirring, and press again to stop. The sturdy lid is designed to prevent spills, ensuring mess-free use every time.
【Easy to Clean】The magnetic stirrer at the bottom of the mug can be detached, making it easy to clean. Simply rinse the self-mixing mug with water. This mug is perfect for quick and efficient stirring, and easy to clean, making it ideal for work or travel.
【Durable Materials】Crafted from 304 stainless steel, this self-stirring mug is made from high-quality, kitchen-grade material that is both durable and safe. The powerful stirrer blends powders in under a minute, so you can say goodbye to using spoons for stirring.
【Perfect Gift】This fun yet practical self-mixing mug makes an excellent gift for coffee lovers, hot chocolate enthusiasts, or anyone who enjoys beverages that need mixing. It's portable and looks great in any setting—whether at home, the office, or a café.
